quotes: Fake a foot drop or piss yourself. This is the absolute nuclear option

Doctor outranked all other words with 624 mentions across posts
Acute pain and chronic pain can be completely separate.
Pain steals sleep. Sleep feeds pain.
The system is designed to exhaust rather than help.

DFNZ has an unprecedented pharmacology for an opioid. It is a potent and high-efficacy analgesic, but in certain contexts it resembles partial agonists — which is what scientists think is needed for safety.

Opioid pain medications are essential for medical purposes, but can lead to addiction and overdose. Developing a highly effective pain medication without these drawbacks would have enormous public health benefits.

Our work helps visualize what has long been invisible or ignored, validates patients' experiences with neuroscientific evidence, and shows that the pain they feel is real, measurable and rooted in brain function.
LDN may operate as a novel anti-inflammatory agent in the central nervous system, via action on microglial cells.
The likelihood of experiencing functional limitations in daily life was highest among those experiencing co-occurring symptoms, compared with those experiencing chronic pain alone.

Many commenters expressed that due to decreases in the aggregate production quotas for oxycodone and hydrocodone, they have had difficulty filling legitimate prescriptions, with delays or the need to visit multiple pharmacies.
